name: skill-architect-update
description: Guided update workflow for existing Claude Code skills.

skill_path.description: Direct path to the skill directory to update. Takes precedence over skill_name.

skill_name.description: Skill name to resolve under ~/.claude/skills/. Ignored if skill_path is provided.

mode.description: Update mode. proof=audit and fix (default), patch=small targeted fix, minor=new feature or section, major=architectural rewrite.
